content:
Medium (requires institutional setup first)

Realistic combined funding for 2025–2026: $45,000–$85,000 USD / €45,000–€70,000 EUR (accounting for currency fluctuations and probability-weighted acceptance rates).

More aggressive scenario (if we apply to 8+ programs strategically):

- Land 2–3 major grants (€40K + $15–30K + €20K) = ~$65,000–$85,000
- Plus 2–3 smaller residencies / microgrants ($5–10K each) = $10,000–$30,000
- Total: $75,000–$115,000 over 12 months

-----

YOUR COMPENSATION: Specific Amounts
